MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: K. Liu ; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Zahid Shaikh is present in Pro Per
Defendants Gerardo Usi and Josielou Ledda are present.
Attorney Kevin King representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Paul Renne, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 501A, for settlement discussions. This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed. The trial date of May-29-2012 is vacated. (501/REQ)
